title: frankenia pulverulenta subsp. florida
intro: Frankenia pulverulenta subsp. florida, also known as the beach heath or sea heath, is a succulent shrub native to coastal regions of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Frankenia pulverulenta subsp. florida is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
